payload.answer: Committed architecture decisions and open questions from the chat summary. Brain DB is treated as the source of truth, Cognee as a rebuildable semantic projection, Slack as a strict memory intake agent, and Telegram/model choice remain open questions rather than decisions.
citations: Brain DB should be the source of truth
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent
Open questions - Should Telegram be added later? Which model is cheapest while saturating performance?

entity_resolution.reason: The summary introduces architecture components and open questions but does not provide stable IDs or require merging with an existing entity.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for the Brain personal memory system.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection of Brain DB rather than the source of truth.
Slack should be a strict memory intake agent for the Brain personal memory system.
It is undecided whether Telegram should be added later as an integration for the Brain personal memory system.
It is undecided which model is cheapest while saturating performance for the Brain personal memory system.

details: Created memory cards for three architecture decisions.
Created memory cards for two open questions.
Preserved open questions as undecided and did not promote them to durable decisions.
